query: BM25 term frequency inverse document frequency

corpus.content:
## BM25 Retrieval

First retrieval stage. Token overlap scores chunks against query. High recall, no model needed.

## Parameters

k1=1.5, b=0.75.

## Weather

Partly cloudy, high 24C, afternoon showers.

## BM25 Fallback

Minimal profile uses BM25 as sole retrieval.

## MRR Impact

Lower than embedding-augmented recall.

## Recipe

Saute onions. Add tomatoes. Simmer 20 minutes.

## Tokenisation

BM25 lowercases, splits on whitespace and punctuation. No stemming.

## Stop Words

Minimal stop-word list removes common function words.

## Fitness

Run 5km three times a week. Strength once.

## Index Update

BM25 index rebuilt from memory store on server start.

## Cost

Rebuilding over 10k chunks takes ~0.3s.

## Travel

Book flights 6-8 weeks ahead. Check visa requirements.

## Normalisation

Raw BM25 scores normalised to [0,1] by dividing by max score.

## Why

Cognitive factors are bounded; unnormalised BM25 would dominate.

## Budget

Track all purchases for one month. Reduce three areas.

## BM25 top-K

Retrieves top-50 before semantic re-ranking.

## K Parameter

Final K = limit (default 20). BM25 over-retrieves 2.5x then re-ranks.

## Weather

Partly cloudy, high 24C, afternoon showers.

query: BM25 recall rate versus embedding precision comparison

corpus.content:
## BM25 vs Embeddings

BM25: higher recall on exact terms. Embeddings: higher precision on paraphrase.

## Combination

Two-stage pipeline: BM25 for broad recall, cosine re-ranking for precision.

Goldset queries requiring BM25 token overlap.

## Why

Ensures BM25-only profile produces usable recall on exact-match queries.

Saute onions. Add tomatoes. Simmer 20 minutes.

Default model: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dim).

## Alternatives

all-mpnet-base-v2: 768-dim, higher quality. MiniLM-L3: fastest.

Run 5km three times a week. Strength once.

Delete hnsw.bin and hnsw.bin.meta.json. Re-ingest.

Decrease batch size if OOM. Increase for GPU.

Chunks with cosine below 0.3 produce fallback_rate hit.

Default 0.3 works for most corpora.

lambda=0 to disable recency weighting.

Raise for higher precision. Lower for more results.
